title: Google Trends - Real Time Trending Data
text: Google Trends is the official source for trending search data provided by Google. It shows the most searched items on Google in real-time and provides historical trend data. The platform allows users to explore what people are searching for across different categories including entertainment, sports, news, and more. Throughout 2025 and into 2026, Google Trends has been used to track the most searched TV shows globally and by region. The data shows that search trends vary significantly by geography, with some shows dominating in the United States while others lead globally. Netflix content has consistently dominated the top positions in Google search trends for television, with shows like Squid Game, Monster: The Ed Gein Story, and The Hunting Wives appearing at the top of various regional and global rankings. This demonstrates both the reach of Netflix's content and the significant interest in entertainment-related searches on Google.
